ogTitle: Weipa Airport vs Weir River: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Weipa Airport and Weir River.
heading: Weipa Airport vs Weir River — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Weipa Airport, Queensland and Weir River, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Weipa Airport has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Weir River (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Weipa Airport or Weir River safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Weipa Airport has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Weir River scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Weipa Airport scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Weir River scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Weipa Airport or Weir River?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Weipa Airport has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.08% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
